Click the `Preview` tab and select a PR template:

| Kind of PR | Description |
| :--------- | :---------- |
| [New contribution](?expand=1&template=new_contrib_pr.md) | For new contributions, vs. updates to existing code or docs. |
| [Update existing docs and/or code](?expand=1&template=update_docs_code_pr.md) | Updates to existing docs or code. |

[//]: # (Dumb that we have to do this hack, see https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/4620 for progress on github fixing this)
